rumor.detail: Confirmed departure from Golden Arrows; being considered for Chiefs assistant coach role

intelUpdates.detail: Agent Mike Makaab officially confirmed Mngqithi departure from Golden Arrows at season end; evaluating Chiefs assistant role alongside international options

newIntel.reasoning: New confirmation from agent (Jun 22) after latest rumor (Jun 17). Official departure confirmed + advanced discussion of Chiefs assistant position qualifies as newer intel beyond existing speculative interest.

rumor.detail: Agreement reached with Belgian club; personal terms agreed. Move to Europe confirmed.

intelUpdates.detail: Royal Charleroi SC deal confirmed; personal terms agreed with Belgian outfit after Pirates missed out on signature

newIntel.reasoning: Jun 25 date (after latest Jun 10 rumor of Pirates deal) supersedes previous Pirates information. Confirmed agreement with Charleroi is materially new intel showing deal progression and destination change.
